label: Sub-workflow
description: Invoke another saved workflow by id and inline its output. Lets you compose flows the way you compose functions.

settings.name: workflowId
settings.label: Workflow
settings.description: Id of the saved workflow to invoke. Templating is supported so the target can be data-driven.

settings.name: passInput
settings.label: Pass input to sub-workflow
settings.description: When true (default), the sub-workflow receives the current input. When false it starts with {}.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Timeout (ms)
settings.description: Hard cap on the sub-workflow's runtime.

ai.shortDescription: Invokes another saved workflow by id and returns its output.
ai.whenToUse: When you want to reuse an existing flow — e.g. the same enrichment + summarisation pipeline from multiple parents.
ai.examplePrompt: run the 'lead-enrichment' workflow on the trigger payload and use its output downstream
ai.promptHints: Reference the sub-workflow's output via {{steps.<id>}}. Set passInput=false if the child should start fresh.

outputAssertions.name: subworkflow_completed_successfully
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Sub-workflow returned no output — the child either short-circuited or its terminal node produced nothing. Treat this as a real failure rather than a successful invocation.
